product.name: FANX 22 Inch Ceiling Fan with Light and Remote, Quiet DC Motor, Dimmable LED, Reversible 3-Speed Control, Easy Installation Downrod Fan for Small Rooms (White)
features: Space-Saving And Safe Design: Downrod construction is ideal for rooms with low ceilings or limited space; enclosed blade design adds safety, making it suitable for children’s rooms or compact interiors.

Powerful And Energy-Efficient Airflow: High-performance DC motor with aerodynamic hidden blades delivers strong airflow; reversible motor supports downward cooling in summer and upward circulation in winter for year-round comfort.
Adjustable LED Lighting: Built-in dimmable LED light allows customizable brightness levels to match different moods and settings; integrated design eliminates need for extra bulbs.
Convenient Remote Control: Remote allows easy adjustment of fan speed, light brightness, and airflow direction; fan and light can be controlled separately for greater flexibility.
Easy Installation: Designed for simple setup with downrod and angled mounting options; includes detailed instructions and tutorial videos for DIY users of all levels.
Quiet And Reliable Performance: DC motor runs with minimal noise, providing a comfortable environment for bedrooms, living rooms, and offices; built for long-lasting performance.
